Classic Mafia: set in a small town, normal townsfolk but a knowledge of a new force in town, but don't know who. Have the players be the ones to decide the fate of the town, the mafia alligned are on the side of the new dark force, the town alligned are against it, the neutral alligned are in it for their own mysterious ends. The theme and mood are suspenseful, noir-inspired, and laden with paranoia. Nothing supernatural, just human nature at its darkest. or otherworldy, but realistic in its depiction of human nature. Their may be a conspiracy, but the changes ar epolitical, criminal, and social, not supernatural. The deaths, if any, are violent but realistic. Night kills are done in darkness and sneaky. Day lynches are chaotic and democratic, with crowds and yelling.
High Fantasy: epic, archaic, and magical, like a D&D campaign
Lovecraftian Horror: set in a small town, normal townsfolk but a knowledge of a new force in town, but don't know who. Have the players be the ones to decide the fate of the town, the mafia alligned are on the side of the new dark force, the town alligned are against it, the neutral alligned are in it for their own mysterious ends. The theme and mood are suspenseful, eldritch, maddening, and terrifying. Something otherworldy and incomprehensible is influencing the town, driving people to madness and despair. The changes are supernatural, eldritch, and cosmic in nature. The deaths, if any, are gruesome and unsettling.
